zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Portman 1st Baronet是Sir Henry Portman和Lady Joan Michell的兒子，於1562年出生在英國薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼。他於1594年1月1日與Anne Gifford在英國英格蘭薩默塞特格阿瑟爾斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1612年12月4日在英國享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Portman 1st Baronet是Sir Henry Portman和Lady Joan Michell的儿子，于1562年出生在英国薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼。他于1594年1月1日与Anne Gifford在英国英格兰薩默塞特格阿瑟爾斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1612年12月4日在英国享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼。

nameMeanings.name: Portman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): status name from Middle English portman ‘townsman, burgher, citizen’ (Old English portmann).

Dutch: from poort ‘gate’ + man ‘man’, an occupational name for a gatekeeper or a topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a walled town. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the more common variant Poortman.

variants.name: Sportsman
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Flemish Sportmans: patronymic from Poortman (see Portman 2), genitivized by the initial s (from des ‘of the’) and the suffix -s.

variants.name: Portmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Helmut, Franz, Hansi, Kurt.

North German: occupational name for a gatekeeper, from Middle Low German port(e) ‘gate’ (from Latin porta) + man ‘man’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a fortified town. Compare Porter .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Portman 1st Baronet was born in 1562, in Orchard Portman, Somerset, England as the son of Sir Henry Portman and Lady Joan Michell. He married Anne Gifford on 1 January 1594, in Goathurst, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 December 1612, in England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Orchard Portman, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Portman 1st Baronet est né en 1562, à Orchard Portman, Somerset, Angleterre, fils de Sir Henry Portman et Lady Joan Michell. Il a épousé Anne Gifford le 1 janvier 1594, à Goathurst, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1612, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Orchard Portman, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Anne Gifford il 1 gennaio 1594, nel Goathurst, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 dicembre 1612, nel England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Orchard Portman, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Portman 1st Baronetは1562年にイギリスソメルセトオルチャード ポルトマンでSir Henry PortmanとLady Joan Michellの息子として生まれた。1594年1月1日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトゴアスウルストでAnne Giffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1612年12月4日にイギリスで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトオルチャード ポルトマンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Portman 1st Baronet(은)는 1562년 영국 서머세트 오처드 포트먼에서 Sir Henry Portman(와)과 Lady Joan Michell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1594년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 고스르스트에서 Anne Gifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1612년 12월 4일 영국에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 오처드 포트먼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Portman 1st Baronet nasceu em 1562, em Orchard Portman, Somerset, Inglaterra filho de Sir Henry Portman e Lady Joan Michell. Ele casou-se com Anne Gifford em 1 de janeiro de 1594, em Goathurst, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1612, em Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Orchard Portman, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Portman 1st Baronet родился в 1562 г. в местности орчард портман, сомирсет, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Henry Portman и Lady Joan Michell. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Gifford 1 января 1594 г. в местности гоатурст, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 декабря 1612 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности орчард портман, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
